description: Ordered Cursor prompts for Billy production readiness. Stops before store binary upload; use Vercel for web testing.
vercelNote: Test the web build on your Vercel production URL (see Vercel dashboard or scripts/deploy-vercel.ps1).

steps.title: How to use this roadmap
steps.humanAction: Run: .\scripts\next-billy-step.ps1 (shows current step). After you finish work in Cursor, run: .\scripts\next-billy-step.ps1 -Complete
steps.cursorPrompt: Read docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md Table of Contents. Confirm repo path is billy_con. Do not start store uploads; web testing uses Vercel.

steps.title: Smoke test web on Vercel
steps.humanAction: Open your Vercel production URL. Sign in, open documents, open scan (or upload), confirm no console errors.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Frontend Agent: Review docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md Part G3 (Web Vercel). List any web-only gaps (CORS, auth redirect, image picker) and fix critical breakages only; keep changes minimal.

steps.title: Supabase dashboard: secrets and CORS
steps.humanAction: In Supabase: set Edge secrets (GEMINI_API_KEY, service role if used), set ALLOWED_ORIGINS to include your Vercel URL. Redeploy Edge Functions if needed.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Backend Agent: Cross-check supabase/functions/_shared/cors.ts and process-invoice / analytics-insights against docs PRODUCTION_READINESS A6. Document exact env vars the operator must set in a short comment at top of _shared/cors.ts if anything is missing.

steps.title: Verify RLS on remote database
steps.humanAction: In Supabase SQL editor, run the pg_policies audit query from docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md A2. Confirm migrations through 20260406120000 are applied.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Backend Agent: Compare docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md A2 and A7 against supabase/migrations (especially production_security_rls and shared_api_keys). If code and doc disagree, update the doc section Current state in one place only.

steps.title: Verify refresh usage limits (re-OCR, analytics, document AI)
steps.humanAction: On Vercel or local: open a document with a linked invoice, use Re-run OCR once; open Analytics and Refresh insights; confirm refresh_used increments and buttons disable at the limit.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Module Agent: Audit refresh limits end-to-end. Confirm increment_refresh_count is invoked for re-OCR/replace scan, analytics refresh, and document AI review; confirm OCR new scans still use increment_ocr_scan only on the scan flow. Fix any missed paths or misleading copy.

steps.title: Export PDF/CSV currency correctness
steps.humanAction: Export a receipt and open CSV/PDF; confirm amounts and currency match the app.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Frontend Agent: Follow docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md C6. Fix lib/features/export/services/pdf_generator.dart and csv_generator.dart to use profile preferred_currency and consistent formatting via AppCurrency where appropriate.

steps.title: Loading, error, and empty states
steps.humanAction: Navigate with slow network or empty account; screens should not spin forever or show blank.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Frontend Agent: Per docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md F1, add or tighten loading/error/empty UI for documents_history_screen, dashboard_screen, and scan_screen. Reuse existing BillyTheme patterns.

steps.title: CI green locally
steps.cursorPrompt: As the DevOps Agent: Ensure .github/workflows/ci.yml runs flutter analyze and flutter test. If useful, add a comment in the workflow linking to docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md D3. Do not add store signing secrets to CI.

steps.title: Document list scalability
steps.humanAction: With many documents, scroll and confirm performance is acceptable.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Frontend Agent: Per docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md B7, add pagination or incremental loading to the main documents list if it loads unbounded rows. Prefer existing Supabase patterns in supabase_service.dart.

steps.title: Storage bucket policies
steps.humanAction: In Supabase Storage, confirm buckets used by Billy have user-scoped policies.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Backend Agent: Per docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md A8, audit which buckets the app uses (grep storage.from). List required RLS-style policies in a brief note in supabase/migrations or as SQL comments if no migration is needed.

steps.title: Android release signing ready
steps.humanAction: Create keystore from android/key.properties.example; keep keystore and key.properties out of git. Build: flutter build appbundle --dart-define-from-file=config/prod.json
steps.cursorPrompt: As the DevOps Agent: Verify android/app/build.gradle.kts release signing matches docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md G2. Fix only if broken; do not commit secrets.

steps.title: iOS App Store metadata (no upload)
steps.humanAction: In App Store Connect, prepare app name, subtitle, privacy policy URL, screenshots placeholders. Do not submit for review until you choose.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Frontend Agent: Per docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md G1, verify Info.plist usage strings (camera, photos, etc.) and any required URL schemes. Add or fix missing keys only.

steps.title: Play Store listing (no upload)
steps.humanAction: In Play Console, prepare store listing and Data safety form. Upload AAB only when ready.
steps.cursorPrompt: As the Module Agent: Per docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md G2, confirm Android manifest permissions match actual features. Document nothing extra.

steps.title: STOP — manual store upload only
steps.humanAction: Upload to App Store Connect and/or Play Console using your Apple/Google accounts. Run flutter build ipa / appbundle with prod defines.
steps.cursorPrompt: No automation past this point. Optionally run a final flutter test and flutter analyze before uploading binaries.
